aliasEditor.helpText: Variant names for an entity such as alternate spelling, different script, stylistic representation, acronyms, etc. Refer to the help page for more details and examples.
aliasEditor.title: Alias Editor
annotationSection.copyrightWarning: Do not submit any copyrighted text here.
annotationSection.heading: Annotation
annotationSection.helpText: Annotations allow you to enter freeform data that does not otherwise fit in the above form.
annotationSection.label: Annotation
annotationSection.openLicenseNoticePre: The contents will be made available to the public under
annotationSection.tooltip: Additional freeform data that does not fit in the above form
disambiguationField.label: Disambiguation
disambiguationField.tooltip: If a different entity with the same name already exists or if there is a need for clarification
identifierEditor.helpText: identity of the entity in other databases and services, such as ISBN, barcode, MusicBrainz ID, WikiData ID, OpenLibrary ID, etc. You can enter either the identifier only (Q2517049) or a full link (https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2517049).
identifierEditor.title: Identifier Editor
languageField.label: Language
nameField.label: Name
nameSection.clickToOpen: Click on a name to open it (Ctrl/Cmd + click to open in a new tab)
nameSection.ctrlClick: Ctrl/Cmd + click to open in a new tab
nameSection.duplicateSuggestion: If the {{entityType}} you want to add appears in the results below, click on it to inspect it before adding a possible duplicate.
nameSection.duplicateWithSameName: with exactly the same name or alias:
nameSection.fillDisambiguation: If you are sure your entry is different, please fill the disambiguation field below to help us differentiate between them.
nameSection.heading: What is the {{entityType}} called?
nameSection.languageTooltip: Language used for the above name
nameSection.nameTooltip: Official name of the {{entityType}} in its original language. Names in other languages should be added as aliases.
sortNameField.label: Sort Name
sortNameField.tooltip: Alphabetical sorting name. Examples: 'Dickens, Charles', 'Christmas Carol, A'. You can try to fill it automatically with the guess button
submissionSection.editNoteHelp:
An edit note will make your entries more credible. Reply to one or more of these questions in the textarea below:
- Where did you get your info from? A link is worth a thousand words.
- What kind of information did you provide? If you made any changes, what are they and why?
- Do you have any questions concerning the editing process you want to ask?
submissionSection.editNoteTooltip: Cite your sources or an explanation of your edit
submissionSection.heading: Submit Your Edit
valueField.label: Value
